response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, experienced engineer (10+ years) with genuine strengths in high-performance, concurrent systems (low-latency async I/O, fibers, multi-threading) and some real C/C++ exposure (NI LabWindows/CVI components, a C++ wave-field-synthesis thesis). However, their primary stack is DLang, Node.js, and TypeScript rather than C++/STL, which is the core requirement here. There is no evidence of message-broker/event-driven architecture at scale with MQTT, and critically no Secure Development Lifecycle, IEC 62443, or industrial-cybersecurity experience. Breadth and craftsmanship are clear, but the depth in the role's central competencies is not demonstrated.
strengths: Strong performance/concurrency background (low-latency, async I/O, multi-threading)
Genuine C/C++ experience plus broad embedded, desktop, and systems work
Mature engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, documentation, agile)
concerns: C++/STL is not the primary stack; mostly DLang and Node/TypeScript
No SDL, IEC 62443, or industrial-cybersecurity experience
No clear message-broker/MQTT or industrial-automation/protocol exposure
